sentences.target: Der Mann geht quer über die Straße.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ man geːt kveːɐ̯ ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃtʁaːsə/

translations.de: Der Mann geht quer über die Straße.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ man geːt kveːɐ̯ ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃtʁaːsə/
translations.en: The man walks diagonally across the street.
translations.es: El hombre cruza la calle en diagonal.
translations.fr: L’homme traverse la rue en diagonale.
translations.it: L’uomo attraversa la strada in diagonale.
translations.zh-Hans: 那名男子斜着穿过马路。
translations.yue: 嗰個男人斜斜地過馬路。
translations.pt: O homem atravessa a rua em diagonal.
translations.vi: Người đàn ông đi chéo qua đường.
translations.nl: De man steekt de straat schuin over.
translations.hu: A férfi átlósan megy át az úton.
translations.hi: आदमी सड़क को तिरछे पार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Mężczyzna przechodzi przez ulicę po przekątnej.
translations.el: Ο άντρας διασχίζει τον δρόμο διαγώνια.
translations.nb: Mannen går på skrå over veien.
translations.id: Pria itu menyeberang jalan secara serong.
translations.ja: 男性は道路を斜めに横断している。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb; indicates orientation/path.
Preposition heading a PP; selects accusative here (directional path).
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Straße'.
Common noun; accusative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'über'.

sentences.target: Die Katze liegt quer auf meiner Tastatur.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkat͡sə liːkt kveːɐ̯ aʊ̯f ˈmaɪ̯nɐ tastaˈtuːɐ̯/

translations.de: Die Katze liegt quer auf meiner Tastatur.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkat͡sə liːkt kveːɐ̯ aʊ̯f ˈmaɪ̯nɐ tastaˈtuːɐ̯/
translations.en: The cat is lying across my keyboard.
translations.es: El gato está tumbado encima de mi teclado.
translations.fr: Le chat est allongé sur mon clavier.
translations.it: Il gatto è sdraiato sulla mia tastiera.
translations.ko: 고양이가 내 키보드 위에 누워 있다.
translations.yue: 隻貓瞓喺我個鍵盤上面。
translations.pt: O gato está deitado em cima do meu teclado.
translations.vi: Con mèo đang nằm vắt ngang trên bàn phím của tôi.
translations.nl: De kat ligt dwars over mijn toetsenbord.
translations.hu: A macska keresztben fekszik a billentyűzetemen.
translations.hi: बिल्ली मेरी कीबोर्ड पर फैलकर लेटी है.
translations.pl: Kot leży w poprzek mojej klawiatury.
translations.el: Η γάτα είναι ξαπλωμένη πάνω στο πληκτρολόγιό μου.
translations.nb: Katten ligger tvers over tastaturet mitt.
translations.id: Kucing itu berbaring melintang di atas keyboard saya.
translations.sv: Katten ligger tvärs över mitt tangentbord.
translations.ro: Pisica stă întinsă peste tastatura mea.
translations.da: Katten ligger på tværs over mit tastatur.
translations.ja: 猫が私のキーボードの上に寝そべっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun; nominative feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; stative predicate.
Adverb of manner modifying 'liegt'; indicates position/orientation.
Preposition heading a PP; takes dative here (location).
Possessive determiner; 1st person singular; dative feminine singular; modifies 'Tastatur'.
Common noun; dative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Ich hänge das Poster quer an die Wand.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhɛŋə das ˈpoːstɐ kveːɐ̯ an diː vant/

translations.de: Ich hänge das Poster quer an die Wand.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhɛŋə das ˈpoːstɐ kveːɐ̯ an diː vant/
translations.en: I'm hanging the poster sideways on the wall.
translations.es: Estoy colgando el póster en horizontal en la pared.
translations.fr: J’accroche l’affiche au mur à l’horizontale.
translations.it: Appendo il poster in orizzontale sulla parete.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把海报横着挂在墙上。
translations.yue: 我把張海報橫住掛喺牆上。
translations.ru: Я вешаю постер горизонтально на стену.
translations.pt: Estou pendurando o pôster na parede na horizontal.
translations.he: אני תולה את הפוסטר על הקיר לרוחב.
translations.vi: Tôi đang treo tấm poster ngang trên tường.
translations.ar: أنا أعلق الملصق على الحائط بشكل أفقي.
translations.nl: Ik hang de poster horizontaal aan de muur.
translations.uk: Я вішаю плакат горизонтально на стіну.
translations.hu: A posztert vízszintesen akasztom a falra.
translations.hi: मैं दीवार पर पोस्टर को आड़े टांग रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Κρεμάω την αφίσα στον τοίχο οριζόντια.
translations.nb: Jeg henger plakaten horisontalt på veggen.
translations.id: Saya menggantung poster di dinding secara mendatar.
translations.sv: Jag hänger affischen horisontellt på väggen.
translations.da: Jeg hænger plakaten vandret på væggen.
translations.ja: ポスターを壁に横向きに掛けている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 1st person singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present, 1st person singular; transitive predicate.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Poster'.
Common noun; accusative neuter singular; direct object of 'hänge'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'hänge'; indicates orientation/placement.
Preposition heading a PP; selects accusative here (goal/direction).
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Wand'.
Common noun; accusative feminine singular; object of the preposition 'an'.

translations.vi: Anh ấy đang gây khó dễ.
translations.ja: 彼は協力しようとしない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; nominative 3rd person singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present, 3rd person singular; predicate.
Reflexive pronoun; accusative 3rd person singular; reflexive object of 'stellt'.
Adverb modifying 'stellt'; part of the idiomatic construction 'sich querstellen' (to obstruct/oppose).
